steps.title: Move to another example
steps.content: The passage first gives an example of an African American history course at the University of Texas. The next sentence gives a parallel example at Howard University, a different institution.

steps.title: Signal a new location
steps.content: Choice A would restate the Texas example. Choice C would make the Howard example a conclusion, and Choice D would narrow the Texas example instead of moving to a separate one. The transition should mark another place. The answer is B.
